function hL({duration: e=Te.duration, bounce: t=Te.bounce, velocity: r=Te.velocity, mass: n=Te.mass}) {

function SE(e=Te.visualDuration, t=Te.bounce) {

        var l;
        if (((l = t.current) == null ? void 0 : l.readyState) !== WebSocket.OPEN)
            try {
                const u = new WebSocket(e);
                u.onopen = () => {
                    i(!0),
                    console.log("WS connected")
                }
                ,
                u.onmessage = c => {
                    try {
                        const d = JSON.parse(c.data);
                        s(d)
                    } catch {}
                }
                ,
                u.onclose = () => {
                    i(!1),
                    console.log("WS disconnected, reconnecting in 3s..."),
                    r.current = setTimeout(o, 3e3)
                }
                ,
                u.onerror = () => {
                    u.close()
                }
                ,
                t.current = u
            } catch {
                r.current = setTimeout(o, 3e3)
            }
    }
    , [e]);
    return p.useEffect( () => (o(),
    () => {
        var l;
        r.current && clearTimeout(r.current),
        (l = t.current) == null || l.close()
    }
    ), [o]),
    {
        connected: n,
        lastMessage: a,
        reconnect: o
    }
}

                    return f.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "grid grid-cols-[40px_1fr_80px_1fr_80px_80px_80px_100px] gap-3 px-4 py-3 hover:bg-[#161a25] transition-colors items-center",
                        children: [f.jsx("span", {
                            className: "text-sm text-gray-600",
                            children: P + 1
                        }), f.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "flex items-center gap-2 min-w-0",
                            children: [j.avatar ? f.jsx("img", {
                                src: j.avatar,
                                alt: "",
                                className: "w-7 h-7 rounded-lg object-cover ring-1 ring-white/10 flex-shrink-0"
                            }) : f.jsx("div", {
                                className: "w-7 h-7 bg-[#1e2333] rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0",
                                children: f.jsx("span", {
                                    className: "text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-500",
                                    children: (j.name || "?").charAt(0).toUpperCase()
                                })
                            }), f.jsxs("div", {
                                className: "min-w-0",
                                children: [f.jsx("p", {
                                    className: "text-sm text-white truncate",
                                    children: j.name || j.steamid
                                }), j.name && j.name !== j.steamid && f.jsx("a", {
                                    href: `https://fearproject.ru/profile/${j.steamid}`,
                                    target: "_blank",
                                    rel: "noopener noreferrer",
                                    className: "text-[10px] text-gray-500 hover:text-blue-400 font-mono truncate block",
                                    children: j.steamid
                                })]
                            })]
                        }), f.jsx("span", {
                            className: "text-xs text-gray-400 font-mono truncate",
                            children: j.steamid
                        }), f.jsx("span", {
                            className: "text-sm text-gray-300 truncate",
                            children: j.reason || "—"
                        }), f.jsx("span", {
                            className: `text-xs font-medium px-2 py-0.5 rounded ${j.type === 1 ? "bg-red-500/20 text-red-400" : "bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400"}`,
                            children: j.type === 1 ? "BAN" : "MUTE"
                        }), f.jsx("span", {
                            className: `text-[11px] font-medium px-2 py-0.5 rounded ${E.color}`,
                            children: E.label
                        }), f.jsxs("span", {
                            className: "text-xs text-gray-400",
                            children: [f.jsx(Ps, {
                                className: "w-3 h-3 inline mr-1"
                            }), w(j.duration)]
                        }), f.jsx("span", {
                            className: "text-xs text-gray-500",
                            children: j.time ? new Date(j.time).toLocaleDateString("ru-RU", {
                                day: "numeric",
                                month: "short",
                                year: "numeric"
                            }) : j.created ? new Date(j.created * 1e3).toLocaleDateString("ru-RU", {
                                day: "numeric",
                                month: "short",
                                year: "numeric"
                            }) : "—"
                        })]
                    }, j.id)
                }
                )
            }) : f.jsx("div", {
                className: "text-center py-12",
                children: o ? f.jsx("p", {
                    className: "text-gray-500",
                    children: "Наказания не найдены"
                }) : f.jsx("p", {
                    className: "text-gray-500",
                    children: "Введите SteamID стаффа"
                })
            })]
        })]
    })
}
function p6() {

      , [r,n] = p.useState("steamid")

      , [y,g] = p.useState(0)
      , [b,v] = p.useState(0)
      , x = p.useCallback(async () => {
        const S = e.trim();
        if (S) {
            u(!0),
            a([]),
            o([]),
            d("");
            try {
                if (r === "discord") {
                    const P = (await Q.searchByQuery(S)).steam_ids || [];
                    if (P.length === 0) {
                        d(`По запросу "${S}" ничего не найдено в базе`),
                        u(!1);
                        return
                    }
                    d(`Найдено ${P.length} SteamID по запросу "${S}"`);
                    const E = await Q.checkAccounts(P);
                    a(E.data || [])
                } else {
                    const j = S.split(/[\n,;\s]+/).map(E => E.trim()).filter(Boolean);
                    if (j.length > 50) {
                        d("Максимум 50 аккаунтов"),
                        u(!1);
                        return
                    }
                    const P = await Q.checkAccounts(j);
                    a(P.data || [])
                }
            } catch {
                a([])
            } finally {
                u(!1)
            }
        }
    }
    , [e, r])
      , w = p.useCallback(async () => {

                }), f.jsx("p", {

                })]
            })]
        })]
    })
}
function m6() {
    const [e,t] = p.useState([])
      , [r,n] = p.useState(!0)
      , [i,a] = p.useState("")
      , [s,o] = p.useState("")
      , [l,u] = p.useState("")
      , [c,d] = p.useState(!1)
      , [h,m] = p.useState(null)
      , y = p.useCallback(async () => {
        try {
            const x = await Q.getWhitelist();
            t(x.data || [])
        } catch {
            t([])
        } finally {
            n(!1)
        }
    }
    , []);
    p.useEffect( () => {
        y()
    }
    , [y]);
    const g = async () => {
        if (s.trim()) {
            d(!0);
            try {
                await Q.addToWhitelist(s.trim(), l.trim()),
                o(""),
                u(""),
                await y()
            } catch (x) {
                console.error("Failed to add:", x)
            } finally {
                d(!1)
            }
        }
    }
      , b = async x => {
        m(x);
        try {
            await Q.deleteFromWhitelist(x),
            await y()
        } catch (w) {
            console.error("Failed to delete:", w)
        } finally {
            m(null)
        }
    }
      , v = e.filter(x => !i || x.name.toLowerCase().includes(i.toLowerCase()) || x.steam_id.includes(i) || x.added_by.toLowerCase().includes(i.toLowerCase()));
    return f.jsxs("div", {
        className: "max-w-[1100px] mx-auto",

}

function P6(e) {
    return e == null ? "—" : e <= 0 ? "∞" : e >= 2592e3 ? `${Math.floor(e / 2592e3)}мес` : e >= 86400 ? `${Math.floor(e / 86400)}д` : e >= 3600 ? `${Math.floor(e / 3600)}ч` : e >= 60 ? `${Math.floor(e / 60)}м` : `${e}с`
}
function N6(e) {
    const t = (e || "—").replace(/\n/g, " ").trim();
    return t.length > 45 ? t.slice(0, 45) + "…" : t
}

function _6(e) {
    var r;
    if (!e)
        return [];
    const t = e.players || ((r = e.data) == null ? void 0 : r.players) || e.data || e;
    return Array.isArray(t) ? t.map(n => ({
        steam_id: n.steam_id || n.steamid || "",
        name: n.name || n.nickname || n.personaname || "Unknown",
        kills: Number(n.kills || 0),
        deaths: Number(n.deaths || 0),
        kd: Number(n.kd || (n.deaths > 0 ? n.kills / n.deaths : 0)),
        avatar: n.avatar || n.avatarfull || ""
    })) : []
}

        var t = new Date(-1,e.m,e.d,e.H,e.M,e.S,e.L);
        return t.setFullYear(e.y),
        t
    }
    return new Date(e.y,e.m,e.d,e.H,e.M,e.S,e.L)
}
function Ep(e) {
    if (0 <= e.y && e.y < 100) {
        var t = new Date(Date.UTC(-1, e.m, e.d, e.H, e.M, e.S, e.L));
        return t.setUTCFullYear(e.y),
        t
    }
    return new Date(Date.UTC(e.y, e.m, e.d, e.H, e.M, e.S, e.L))
}

function Ej(e, t) {

    }

}
function Vu(e) {

}
function PH(e, t, r) {
    return (t = NH(t))in e ? Object.defineProperty(e, t, {
        value: r,
        enumerable: !0,
        configurable: !0,

    }) : e[t] = r,

}
function NH(e) {
    var t = kH(e, "string");
    return typeof t == "symbol" ? t : t + ""
}
function kH(e, t) {
    if (typeof e != "object" || !e)
        return e;
    var r = e[Symbol.toPrimitive];
    if (r !== void 0) {
        var n = r.call(e, t);
        if (typeof n != "object")
            return n;
        throw new TypeError("@@toPrimitive must return a primitive value.")
    }
    return (t === "string" ? String : Number)(e)

function Pr(e) {

        switch (t) {

                e) {

                case ph:

                    return e;
                case dh:
                    return e;

                }
            }

            return t
        }
    }
}

var HZ = {}
  , e5 = jt({
    name: "errorBars",
    initialState: HZ,
    reducers: {
        addErrorBar: (e, t) => {
            var {itemId: r, errorBar: n} = t.payload;
            e[r] || (e[r] = []),
            e[r].push(n)
        }
        ,
        replaceErrorBar: (e, t) => {
            var {itemId: r, prev: n, next: i} = t.payload;
            e[r] && (e[r] = e[r].map(a => a.dataKey === n.dataKey && a.direction === n.direction ? i : a))
        }
        ,
        removeErrorBar: (e, t) => {
            var {itemId: r, errorBar: n} = t.payload;
            e[r] && (e[r] = e[r].filter(i => i.dataKey !== n.dataKey || i.direction !== n.direction))
        }

                                    className: `absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-5 h-5 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-[10px] font-bold text-white ${x === 0 ? "bg-yellow-500" : x === 1 ? "bg-gray-400" : "bg-amber-600"}`,
                                    children: x + 1
                                })]
                            }), f.jsxs("div", {
                                className: "flex-1 min-w-0",
                                children: [f.jsx("p", {
                                    className: "font-semibold text-white truncate",
                                    children: v.name
                                }), f.jsx("span", {
                                    className: `inline-block text-[10px] font-semibold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full border ${Hee[v.group_name] || "bg-gray-500/20 text-gray-400 border-gray-500/30"}`,
                                    children: v.role
                                })]
                            }), f.jsx("div", {
                                className: "text-right",
                                children: f.jsxs("p", {
                                    className: "text-lg font-bold text-white",
                                    children: ["LVL ", v.level]
                                })
                            })]
                        })
                    }, v.steam_id)
                }
                )
            })]
        })]
    })
}

}

                    className: "w-4 h-4 text-gray-400"
                })
            })]
        }), i ? f.jsx("div", {
            className: "flex items-center justify-center h-40",
            children: f.jsx("div", {
                className: "w-8 h-8 border-4 border-accent-blue/30 border-t-accent-blue rounded-full animate-spin"
            })
        }) : e.length === 0 ? f.jsxs("div", {
            className: "glass-card p-8 text-center",
            children: [f.jsx(vl, {
                className: "w-8 h-8 text-gray-600 mx-auto mb-3"
            }), f.jsx("p", {
                className: "text-gray-500",
                children: "No logs found"
            })]
        }) : f.jsx("div", {
            className: "space-y-1",
            children: e.map(k => {
                const O = rte[k.level] || ZE;
                return f.jsxs(R.div, {
                    initial: {
                        opacity: 0,
                        x: -5
                    },
                    animate: {
                        opacity: 1,
                        x: 0
                    },
                    className: "flex items-start gap-3 px-4 py-2.5 bg-[#12151e] rounded-lg border border-white/5 hover:border-white/10 transition-colors",
                    children: [f.jsx("span", {
                        className: "text-xs text-gray-600 font-mono w-16 flex-shrink-0 pt-0.5",
                        children: k.id
                    }), f.jsxs("span", {
                        className: `inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-bold uppercase border flex-shrink-0 ${tte[k.level] || "bg-gray-500/10 text-gray-400 border-gray-500/20"}`,
                        children: [f.jsx(O, {
                            className: "w-3 h-3"
                        }), k.level]
                    }), f.jsx("span", {
                        className: "px-2 py-0.5 bg-white/5 rounded text-[10px] text-gray-400 font-mono flex-shrink-0",
                        children: k.service
                    }), f.jsx("span", {
                        className: "text-sm text-gray-300 flex-1 min-w-0 truncate",
                        children: k.message
                    }), f.jsxs("span", {
                        className: "text-xs text-gray-600 flex-shrink-0 flex items-center gap-1",
                        children: [f.jsx(Ps, {
                            className: "w-3 h-3"
                        }), E(k.created_at)]
                    })]
                }, k.id)
            }
            )
        }), r > S && f.jsxs("div", {
            className: "flex items-center justify-between",
            children: [f.jsxs("span", {
                className: "text-sm text-gray-500",
                children: ["Showing ", y * S + 1, "–", Math.min((y + 1) * S, r), " of ", r]
            }), f.jsxs("div", {
                className: "flex gap-2",
                children: [f.jsx("button", {
                    onClick: () => g(Math.max(0, y - 1)),
                    disabled: y === 0,
                    className: "px-3 py-1.5 glass-card text-sm text-gray-300 disabled:opacity-30 hover:border-accent-blue/30 transition-all",
                    children: "Prev"
                }), f.jsx("button", {
                    onClick: () => g(y + 1),
                    disabled: (y + 1) * S >= r,
                    className: "px-3 py-1.5 glass-card text-sm text-gray-300 disabled:opacity-30 hover:border-accent-blue/30 transition-all",
                    children: "Next"
                })]
            })]
        })]
    })
}
